content_profile: Expert software engineer with 8+ years building backend systems and APIs. Methodical reader who explores code thoroughly before making changes. Favors incremental, well-tested improvements over large rewrites. Strong preference for clean architecture, comprehensive documentation, and explicit error handling.
behavioral_patterns: Reads multiple related files before beginning any edit
Creates or updates tests alongside every feature change
Writes detailed commit messages focusing on the why not the what
Prefers small focused functions over large monolithic ones
Documents complex business logic and non-obvious invariants inline
Uses search and grep extensively to understand call sites before refactoring
absence_flags: Does not create binary or image files in code sessions
Avoids large reorganization commits — prefers focused changes

content_chunks.text: Expert in Python backend development using FastAPI and SQLAlchemy. Deep knowledge of async patterns, database connection pooling, and REST API design conventions including versioning and pagination.
Experienced in React and TypeScript frontend development. Familiar with hooks, context, component composition patterns, and Tailwind CSS utility-first styling.
Strong foundation in database design: PostgreSQL schema normalization, index strategy for query optimization, migration management with Alembic, and Redis caching patterns.
Proficient in testing at all levels: unit tests with pytest and mock, integration tests with FastAPI TestClient, end-to-end tests with Playwright. Prioritizes test coverage for business logic.
